title: QUA-344-C3 Dispatch + Baseline Binding
body:
Parent: QUA-344
Owner: CTO

Scope
- Define terminal/profile.
- Define symbol/timeframe baseline (D1 minimum).
- Define backtest window + spread/model assumptions.
- Select initial risk mode (`risk_mode_single` or `risk_mode_dual`).

Acceptance
- One canonical executable pipeline command exists with no missing fields.
